textByHash.9a5898246c6c8ad670b5ff23e960ddd8fc32e505: Hello there. What do you need?
textByHash.b805594abb3d21dac66221c313c982fe04d3eff1: I mostly look after the lab equipment and make sure things run as they should.
textByHash.62265674e4f153f2acc55dd1a8649d61be8f7b6f: These days, I'm not much into the production side of things... All that moving up and down, pulling levers, carrying vials... These old bones ain't what they used to be.
textByHash.06f78743deb8da6b48b04ab51a26b144a5036a0e: Of course! Some of the mixtures down here can get pretty nasty in their raw form. Safety first!
textByHash.7a3925cb184bfb12f9519e74aca801ce3e0f5757: Although between you and me... I'm not sure if anything this lab produces can be considered truly safe for human consumption.
